title: Pixlplus Bag
description: A Pixelmon addon that adds a bag and multiple QoL features
body:
This Pixelmon addon includes a bag item with the aim of greatly improving the normal gameplay experience through various QoL additions:
- A dyeable bag that can currently hold up to 135 stacks of items
- Can be equipped to chest slot for functional and cosmetic purposes
- Able to be right clicked to open bag menu or main/offhand
- Auto pickup of any dropped item into a bag if items of the same type are stored in the equipped bag
- Potions, revives and full heals can be applied from the bag menu by right clicking the Pokémon's icon and then right clicking the item(not completely tested)
- Multiple bag categories to swap from miscellaneous items to balls, TMs, battle items, and medicine
- Bag inventory can be used in battle, but only one bag at a time (order of priority is equipped bag>mainhand>offhand>hotbar>main inventory)

This mod is currently very early in development so it's highly recommended to back up any world that you use this mod in (please report any issues you encounter along with the log file)
